name: Pineapple Mint Tulip (Na)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart measure, combine the DOLE pineapple juice, powdered sugar, and grenadine syrup.
Stir well until all ingredients are fully mixed.
2. Rub the fresh mint sprig around the inside of a tall glass, partially fill with ice or juice cubes, and pour in the juice mixture.
